content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 30, 2005

Bonnie Demo
631 El Verano Avenue
Corning, CA 96021

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-192

Dear Ms. Demo:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your September 13, 2005, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ as you requested. Consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[Signature]
By: Leslie L. Crowe
Intern, Legal Division

LLC:rd

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
